parameters.jsCode: const tz = "America/New_York";function fmt(d){const ld=new Date(d.toLocaleString("en-US",{timeZone:tz}));return ld.toISOString().slice(0,10);}const now=new Date();const today=fmt(now);const yday=fmt(new Date(now.getTime()-24*3600*1000));return [{today,yday}];

const all=$input.all().flatMap(it=>(it.json.dates||[]).flatMap(d=>d.games||[]));const now=Date.now(),pre=600000,post=21600000;const active=all.filter(g=>{try{const t=new Date(g.gameDate).getTime();return (t-pre)<=now && now<=(t+post);}catch{return false;}});return active.map(g=>({json:{gamePk:g.gamePk}}));

const out=[];$input.all().forEach(it=>{const plays=it.json.liveData?.plays?.allPlays||[];const gamePk=it.json.gamePk;for(const p of plays){if(p.result?.eventType==='home_run') out.push({json:{gamePk,play:p}});}});return out;

const inputs=$input.all();const hrs=$items("06 Extract New HR Plays1",0)||[];const out=[];function asArr(x){return Array.isArray(x)?x:(x?[x]:[])}function collect(c){const it=[];const h=c?.highlights||{};it.push(...asArr(h?.highlights?.items));it.push(...asArr(h?.live?.items));const ed=c?.editorial||{};it.push(...asArr(ed?.recap?.items));it.push(...asArr(ed?.featured?.items));const m=c?.media||{};for(const g of asArr(m?.epg)) it.push(...asArr(g?.items));return it.filter(Boolean)}function playbacks(it){const p=it?.playbacks||[];return p.map(pb=>pb?.url||"").filter(u=>u.endsWith('.mp4'))}function rxAll(c){try{const s=JSON.stringify(c);const m=s.match(/https?:\/\/[^"']+\.mp4/gi)||[];return Array.from(new Set(m))}catch{return[]}}function prefer4000K(a){if(!a?.length) return null;return a.find(u=>u.includes('4000K'))||a[0]}for(let i=0;i<inputs.length;i++){const c=inputs[i]?.json??{};const u=hrs[i]?.json??{};const play=u.play,gamePk=u.gamePk;if(!play||!gamePk) continue;const batterId=play?.matchup?.batter?.id;const items=collect(c);const urls=[];for(const it of items){const t=String(it?.headline||it?.title||it?.blurb||it?.description||"").toLowerCase();const looks=t.includes('home run')||t.includes('homers')||t.includes('homer');const by=!batterId||(it?.keywordsAll||[]).some(k=>k?.type==='player'&&String(k?.playerId)===String(batterId));if(!looks||!by) continue;urls.push(...playbacks(it))}if(urls.length===0) urls.push(...rxAll(c));const unique=[...new Set(urls)];const diamond=unique.filter(u=>u.includes('mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com'));const dark=unique.filter(u=>u.includes('darkroom-clips.mlb.com')||u.includes('darkroom'));const d=prefer4000K(diamond);const a=dark[0]||null;if(d&&a) out.push({json:{gamePk,play,d,a}})}return out;

const items=$input.all().map((item,idx)=>{const j=item.json||{};const play=j.play;const gamePk=j.gamePk;const d=j.d;const a=j.a;const tz="America/New_York";const now=new Date();const ld=new Date(now.toLocaleString("en-US",{timeZone:tz}));const pad=n=>n<10?("0"+n):(""+n);const today=ld.toISOString().slice(0,10);const ts=ld.getFullYear()+pad(ld.getMonth()+1)+pad(ld.getDate())+"_"+pad(ld.getHours())+pad(ld.getMinutes())+pad(ld.getSeconds());const baseDir="/Users/benbirkhahn/HomerTrakker";const postsDir=baseDir+"/MLB_HomeRun_Posts/"+today;const videosDir=postsDir+"/videos";const atbat=((play?.about?.atBatIndex??idx)+1);const num=String(gamePk)+String(atbat).padStart(3,'0');function basename(u){try{const f=new URL(u).pathname.split('/').pop()||'asset.mp4';return f.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g,'')}catch{const m=String(u).match(/([^/?#]+\.mp4)(?:[?#]|$)/i);return (m&&m[1])||`asset_${Date.now()}.mp4`}}const file1=`homer_${num}_1_${basename(d)}`;const file2=`homer_${num}_2_animated_${basename(a)}`;const video1Path=`${videosDir}/${file1}`;const video2Path=`${videosDir}/${file2}`;const postPath=`${postsDir}/tonights_homer_${num}_${ts}.txt`;const batter=play?.matchup?.batter?.fullName||'Unknown Player';const pitcher=play?.matchup?.pitcher?.fullName||'';const inning=`${play?.about?.halfInning||''} ${play?.about?.inning||''}`.trim();const desc=play?.result?.description||'';const lines=[];lines.push("TONIGHT'S HOME RUN - READY FOR @homertrakker");lines.push("=======================================================");lines.push("");lines.push("CAPTION:");lines.push("🏠⚾ HOME RUN ALERT! ⚾🏠");lines.push(`🔥 ${batter}`);if(pitcher)lines.push(`⚾ vs ${pitcher}`);if(inning)lines.push(`📊 ${inning}`);if(desc)lines.push(desc);lines.push("");lines.push("HASHTAGS:");lines.push("#MLB #HomeRun #Baseball #MLBShorts #Statcast");lines.push("");lines.push("VIDEOS:");lines.push("1. clip");lines.push(`   ${d}`);lines.push("2. clip");lines.push(`   ${a}`);lines.push("");lines.push("HOME RUN DATA:");lines.push(`GamePk: ${gamePk}`);lines.push(`Batter: ${batter}`);if(inning)lines.push(`Inning: ${inning}`);const postText=lines.join('\n')+'\n';return {json:{today,num,postText,postPath,postsDir,videosDir,d,a,video1Path,video2Path,gamePk}}});return items;

const out=[];const src=$items("09 Build Post + Paths",0)||[];for(const it of src){const j=it.json||{};const buf=Buffer.from(String(j.postText||''),'utf8');const bin=await this.helpers.prepareBinaryData(buf,'post.txt');out.push({json:j,binary:{data:bin}})}return out;
const src=$items("09 Build Post + Paths",0)||[];const out=[];for(const it of src){const j=it.json||{};if(typeof j.d==='string'&&j.d.startsWith('http')) out.push({json:j})}return out;
const src=$items("09 Build Post + Paths",0)||[];const out=[];for(const it of src){const j=it.json||{};if(typeof j.a==='string'&&j.a.startsWith('http')) out.push({json:j})}return out;
